summary: SARF-ARCH-001 is resolved at frozen HEAD 354e0f7dd7080971c0af8e910f542713fd5136be. Formal Spec scenarios S-001 and S-002 now resolve to the Architecture headings Freshness State Machine and Fail-closed Boundaries, while the runtime freshness contract remains unchanged.

Concern: the repair might alter runtime behavior. Conclusion: the repair changes Architecture headings and the Story-local bounded review allowance only; src/agent-review.js, src/content-binding.js, and E2E code are unchanged from the previously reviewed tree.
